title: CREDAI is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: CREDAI is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!
